rationale: SKILL procedure-correctness + framing lens, all clear. The new 'Refutation procedure (per-slot, always audited)' is item 5, sitting directly beside the abandon procedure (item 4) under § After a halt — recovery. It names the exact {slot,round,reason,evidence} schema (matches panel.go Refutation struct) and the filename-derived byte-exact slot (matches tally.go isRefuted case-sensitive match on Verdict.Slot). The gate-validates-not-record contract is stated correctly: clears ONLY that slot's latest-round REQUEST_CHANGES; never REJECT/hard_block/unrecognized; never staleness/incompleteness/the approve floor; refuted RC never counts as APPROVE (gate.go leg 9.5 layered on threshold floor, Approves untouched); re-RC at a newer round blocks again (Round==LatestRound exact match). The durable panel_refuted audit is described as written from a self-contained marker at apply time, not by re-reading panel files (matches panel_advisory.go persistRefutationPending + reconcile-from-marker; refutationPendingEntry carries slot/round/reason/evidence). NO discharge language (grep clean across all 3 docs). Abandon-parallel framing present: legitimate because always audited never silent, reason+evidence carry legitimacy, empty-reason footgun (Reason is omitempty → still clears). Example slot 'R4' matches real verdict filenames (R4-round-1.json exists). No paste-able skip incantation beyond the documented hand-edit ('there is no CLI verb'). Both anti-pattern bullets updated: N−1 now a floor-not-sufficient, and any-unresolved-RC-blocks with refutation as the only per-slot escape.

findings.detail: Item 5 correctly names {slot,round,reason,evidence} schema + filename-derived byte-exact slot; grounded against panel.go Refutation struct and tally.go isRefuted.

Clears-only-latest-round-RC / never-REJECT-hard_block-unrecognized / never-staleness-incompleteness-floor / re-RC-blocks-again / Approves-never-incremented all match gate.go leg 9.5 + tally.go UnresolvedVerdicts.

panel_refuted audit described as written from a self-contained apply-time marker not by re-reading panels; matches panel_advisory.go refutationPendingEntry (slot/round/reason/evidence) + reconcile. No discharge/re-tally language anywhere (grep clean).

Abandon-parallel legitimacy framing and empty-reason footgun present; both anti-pattern bullets updated (floor-not-sufficient; any-RC-blocks + refutation the only per-slot escape). Example slot 'R4' matches real verdict filenames.
